no. of videos in 2024.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM youtube_videos_staging WHERE timestamp BETWEEN '2024-01-01 00:00:00' AND '2024-12-31 23:59:59'

average views in united states.sql: SELECT AVG(views) AS avg_views FROM youtube_videos_staging WHERE region = 'US'

which countries are watching our videos.sql: SELECT region, SUM(views) AS sum_views FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY region ORDER BY SUM(views) DESC

show percetage of videos in each categor.sql: SELECT category, COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER() AS percent FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY category

average views in india for educational v.sql: SELECT AVG(views) AS avg_views FROM youtube_videos_staging WHERE region = 'IN' AND category = 'Education'

if i had to focus on views what sort of.sql: SELECT category, AVG(views) AS avg_views FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY category ORDER BY AVG(views) DESC

what's the ratio of likes to views?.sql: SELECT SUM(likes) * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM(views),0) AS ratio FROM youtube_videos_staging

average views by region.sql: SELECT region, AVG(views) AS avg_views FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY region

total likes by category.sql: SELECT category, SUM(likes) AS sum_likes FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY category

top languages with most engagement rate.sql: SELECT language, AVG(views) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) AS ratio FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY language

average views in us.sql: SELECT AVG(views) AS avg_views FROM youtube_videos_staging WHERE region = 'US'

views by category.sql: SELECT category, SUM(views) AS sum_likes FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY category

show percentage of videos in each catego.sql: SELECT category, COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER() AS percent FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY category

compare average views, likes, and commen.sql: SELECT category, AVG(views) AS avg_views, AVG(likes) AS avg_likes, AVG(comments) AS avg_comments FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY category

if i wanted to focus on views what kinds.sql: SELECT category, SUM(views) AS sum_views FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY category ORDER BY SUM(views) DESC

sentiment by region.sql: SELECT region, AVG(sentiment_score) AS avg_sentiment_score FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY region

show views by category.sql: SELECT category, SUM(views) AS sum_views FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY category

does duration_sec correlate with higher.sql: SELECT AVG(duration_sec) AS avg_duration_sec, AVG(views) AS avg_views FROM youtube_videos_staging

compare views and likes between ads_enab.sql: SELECT ads_enabled, SUM(views) AS sum_views, SUM(likes) AS sum_likes FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY ads_enabled

show total views, likes, comments, and s.sql: SELECT SUM(views) AS sum_views, SUM(likes) AS sum_likes, SUM(comments) AS sum_comments, SUM(shares) AS sum_shares FROM youtube_videos_staging

show total views, likes, comments and sh.sql: SELECT SUM(views) AS sum_views, SUM(likes) AS sum_likes, SUM(comments) AS sum_comments, SUM(shares) AS sum_shares FROM youtube_videos_staging

show views, likes, comments and shares.sql: SELECT SUM(views) AS sum_views, SUM(likes) AS sum_likes, SUM(comments) AS sum_comments, SUM(shares) AS sum_shares FROM youtube_videos_staging
